User.title: User
User.description: User account registration data, credentials, password, and real-time coin balance.

username.description: Unique username chosen by the player (alphanumeric/no spaces).

email.description: Email address used for logging in.

phone.description: Formatted phone number of the player.

password.description: Plaintext passwords for simulated credential authentications.

balance.description: Real-time count of free virtual coins the user has.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last alteration to user state/balance.
